fixtures._comment: headless-simple D5 probe (d5-headless-simple.ts) clicks the 'Say hello in one short sentence.' chip. Reply is intentionally NON-boilerplate so the probe's non-empty assistant-bubble assertion is unambiguous. context:hermes isolates per-integration.

match.userMessage: Say hello in one short sentence

response.content: Hi! In one short sentence: I'm a CopilotKit demo agent here to help you try features.
Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!
A fun fact: Honey never spoils! Archaeologists have found pots of honey in ancient Egyptian tombs that are over 3,000 years old and still perfectly edible.
